title: Edible Glitter Spray - 22g Luster Dust Edible Food Grade Glitter Shimmer Dust Powder for Cocktails, Drinks, Cake Decorating - Metallic Food Colouring Powder for Wine, Candy, Cookie, Icing (Green)
features: LUXURY LUSTER DUST - Soft and fine texture dust powder can create high luster pearlized effects and adding a metallic finish to various projects and occasion. Brilliant edible luster dust powder, high quality, affordability and safety.

SAFE FOOD GRADE INGREDIENTS - Our icing decorating dusting powder adopt food grade ingredients, no sugar or spices. Gluten free, dairy free, vegan, allergen-free. It provides vibrant metallic effects for all types of applications without changing the taste or texture.

SIMPLE TO USE - Edible glitter powder is pack in the Spray Pump Bottle, you could easily and precisely spray the luster powder to your projects. Brush dry onto your projects directly, or dilute it with vodka or oil-based flavorings to apply on food with a brush. Please do not mix it with water or it will be clumpy.

WIDE APPLICATION - The shimmer luster dusts food colouring powder is ideal for decorating fondant, chewing gum paste, cake, icing, cookie, metallic finish, chocolate and other gourmet baked goods. You can also create shimmery cocktails, champagne or any luxury beverage.

COST-EFFECTIVE - A little goes a long way. Discover a shimmer world of creative metallic colour with our sparkling luster powder. Click ‘Add to Cart’ and show off your creative side to produce stunning glamorized treats!
